{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Naganadel
|type1=Poison
|type2=Dragon
|img=Lusamine Naganadel Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM29
|epname=Darkness!! The Mysterious Claws of Necrozma!
|desc={{p|Naganadel}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. It was originally befriended by [[Phyco]] so it could take him through [[Ultra Space]] via [[Ultra Warp Ride]]. It was later caught by Lusamine in a [[Beast Ball]] to add to her collection.

None of Naganadel's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Nihilego 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Nihilego
|type1=Rock
|type2=Poison
|img=Lusamine Nihilego Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM19
|epname=Truth and the Mastermind Behind Team Skull
|desc={{p|Nihilego}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon and was caught in a [[Beast Ball]]. It was first summoned with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power. Guzma was captured by Nihilego, who proceeded to drag him into an [[Ultra Wormhole]]. It was later caught by Lusamine and used to confront {{adv|Sun}} and {{adv|Moon}} at the [[Ultra Megalopolis]] by fusing with Lusamine.

None of Nihilego's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Ultra Beasts
|type1=???
|img=Lusamine Ultra Beasts Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM25
|epname=Summon the Emissaries of the Moon and the Sun
|desc=These [[Ultra Beast]]s were summoned to [[Alola]] with {{p|Cosmog}}'s power and include an unknown number of {{p|Nihilego}}, {{p|Buzzwole}}, {{p|Pheromosa}}, {{p|Xurkitree}}, {{p|Celesteela}}, {{p|Kartana}}, {{p|Guzzlord}}, and {{p|Blacephalon}}. After converging on [[Poni Island]], they were {{pkmn2|caught}} by Lusamine. Later, they were used to battle {{adv|Sun}} at the [[Ultra Megalopolis]].

None of their moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Celesteela
|type1=Steel
|type2=Flying
|img=Lusamine Celesteela Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM26
|epname=Adventure in the Dark Dimension
|desc={{p|Celesteela}} is one of the Ultra Beasts Lusamine caught. It was first used to prevent [[Wicke]] and an {{tc|Aether Foundation Employee}} from getting on [[Poni Island]] to meet with Lusamine.

None of Celesteela's moves are known.}}
